violations.text: The condenser located in the dairy walk-in cooler area was not in good repair (leak and ice buildup was observed). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy retail shelves and grab and go unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC cleaned. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Potato (steak fries), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC disposed of item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Inspector observed ingredients and allergen information lacking for the self service olive bar and self service bakery items. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

The following was not in good repair: - hood vents in deli area (missing panel) - meat retail freezer (broken gasket) - ice cream retail freezer (heavy ice accumulation) - knife in bakery (broken handle) PIC has a service call for freezers. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Pressboard wood is used in the construction of shelf liner in the produce walk-in area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - milk retail cooler - grab and go cooler - bakery mixer shield - walk-in fan covers (all) - retail cooler cones (above hummus) - slicer - deli freezer - deli prep cold case New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Inspector observed trash compactor in poor repair (leaking). New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

The floors in the mezzanine and ceiling in the produce walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

The ceiling tiles in the retail, back hallway, men's room area is in poor repair (missing ceiling tiles). The walk-in condensers (produce, meat, and dairy) is in poor repair (leak). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC has a service call in. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the following refrigeration units. 1. Deli Case 2. Bakery Walk-In Cooler Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024

The following areas are in poor repair. 1. Missing ceiling tile (produce area) 2. Ceiling missing pieces (produce area) 3. Cracked light shield (bakery) 4. Walk-In Cooler Dairy/Produce (cracked walls) 5. Walk-In Freezer (ice accumulation) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

The coving in the walk-in cooler (dairy) are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
